generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for object detection and proximity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for capturing depth information and visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraDepthData
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDepthCameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance IntelDepthCameraDepthRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN and Kalman filter algorithms for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs object detection using DBSCAN and Kalman filter algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions for sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured data storage and reporting using SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low-latency communication between physical and digital components using ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Edge computing capabilities on vehicle's hardware using NVIDIA Jetpack"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance PythonCplusplus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data processing and control algorithm implementation using Python and C++"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, DataTranslationComponent
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation and model-based design of ACC logic using MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic model designed using MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle speed via motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls steering angle for vehicle direction"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manages data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication, along with inherent system resources (compute, sensors, actuators) and automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Handles data management and control mechanisms"
    base:contains DataTranslationComponent, PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, SQLDatabase, ROS2, NVIDIAJetpack, PythonCplusplus, MATLABSimulink, ACCModel
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface entity containing 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for controlling ACC settings and issuing commands"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via user interface for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight
]

instance OffloadComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC system processing tasks to external resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC system processing (lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands) from on-board hardware to external resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides OffloadComputationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and issue emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCACTION, SetDesiredSpeedACTION, EmergencyBrakingACTION
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, position, and status"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving paths based on ACC logic"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of detected objects in proximity to the vehicle"
]

instance EnableACCACTION : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedACTION : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set the desired speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingACTION : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency braking command to stop the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed) are initiated via the Control Panel User Interface FE in the User Entity. The ACC Controlling FE processes these commands to compute required speed, followed by the Data Translation component for serialization and unit conversion. The Actuation FE converts the desired speed into motor voltage commands for physical actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices in safety-critical vehicular applications, as dictated by hardware limitations and industry standards."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system architecture follows ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA), with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages. Each package contains one or more ROS2 nodes. The entities are structured into Physical Twin Entity (handling data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel), each deployed on separate hardware components. The Physical Twin Entity deviates from ISO 23247 RA by encompassing general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) rather than being limited to resource-specific OME."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2 network, and inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployment uses edge hardware including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer and NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna on the physical vehicle. Computation offloading is implemented between the Digital Twin and physical entities, with components distributed across different hardware platforms for scalability and real-time processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The reference architecture (Part 2) defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity, each composed of Functional Entities (FEs) responsible for specific tasks such as data transformation into human-interpretable formats and user interaction interfaces."
]
